startPoint.en: Talk to Yanni Salika in the antique shop in Shilo Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Yanni Salika en la tienda de antigüedades de Shilo Village.

items.name: Pigeon cage
items.display: 5 pigeon cages (obtained during the quest; south of the Ardougne north bank)

recommended.name: Fairy ring
recommended.display: Access to fairy rings and the gnome glider system

recommended.name: Port Sarim lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Port Sarim, Taverley, and Falador lodestone (or Edgeville lodestone)

recommended.name: Ring of kinship
recommended.display: A ring of kinship or other bank teleport

recommended.name: Skull sceptre
recommended.display: Skull sceptre for Barbarian Village teleport

recommended.name: Disk of returning (Gower Quest)
recommended.display: Disk of returning from the Gower Quest to easily reach the Dwarven mines

recommended.name: Prayer potion
recommended.display: Prayer potions for the fight with Slagilith

recommended.name: Coins
recommended.display: Around 2,000 coins or 2 each of opal, jade and red topaz to replace crushed gems

rewards.display: 2 antique lamps giving 10,000 experience to any skill of your choice. Skill must be at least level 30.

rewards.name: Steel key ring
rewards.display: Steel key ring (automatically added to the tool belt)

rewards.name: Guthix rest
rewards.display: Ability to make Guthix rest potions

rewards.name: Gnome glider
rewards.display: Access to the gnome glider route to the Feldip Hills

rewards.name: Adamantite stone spirit
rewards.display: Adamantite stone spirit, an uncut ruby and an uncut diamond dropped by Slagilith
1,000 experience from repairing the weather vane components

text.en: Talk to Yanni Salika in Shilo Village (north of the bridge).
text.es: Habla con Yanni Salika en Shilo Village (al norte del puente).

chatOptions: 2 Is there anything else interesting to do around here?
5 Ok, see you in a tick!
Accept

text.en: Talk to one of the jungle foresters south of the village. You will receive their blunt hatchet.
text.es: Habla con uno de los jungle foresters al sur de la aldea. Recibirás su blunt hatchet.

chatOptions: 4 I need to talk to you about red mahogany.
1 Ok, I'll take your hatchet to get it sharpened.

text.en: 3 steel bars, clean harralander, clean marrentill, and vial of water
text.es: 3 steel bars, clean harralander, clean marrentill, y vial of water

text.en: Speak to Brian in Port Sarim (Axe shop north-east of the lodestone). Make sure he takes the blunt hatchet before you leave.
text.es: Habla con Brian en Port Sarim (la tienda de hachas al noreste de la lodestone). Asegúrate de que coge el blunt hatchet antes de irte.

chatOptions: 3 Do you sharpen hatchets?
2 Look, can you sharpen this cursed hatchet or what?
4 Ok, ok, I'll do it! I'll go and see Aggie.

text.en: Speak to Aggie, the witch in Draynor Village.
text.es: Habla con Aggie, la bruja de Draynor Village.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about One Small Favour.
3 Let me guess, you're going to ask me to do you a favour?
2 Oh, Ok, I'll see if I can find Jimmy.

text.en: Go to the H.A.M. Hideout (north-west of the Lumbridge Castle, in the Lumbridge forest). Pick the lock on the trapdoor, and climb down. Head to the middle southern cavern and speak to Johanhus Ulsbrecht.
text.es: Ve al H.A.M. Hideout (al noroeste del Lumbridge Castle, en el bosque de Lumbridge). Fuerza la cerradura de la trampilla y baja. Dirígete a la caverna central sur y habla con Johanhus Ulsbrecht.

chatOptions: 4 I'm looking for Jimmy the Chisel.
3 And I suppose you need me to do you a favour?
2 Ok, Jimmy has to be worth more than a few scrawny chickens!

text.en: Or if player has completed The Chosen Commander.
text.es: O si el jugador ha completado The Chosen Commander.

chatOptions: 2 One Small Favour
4 I'm looking for Jimmy the Chisel.
3 And I suppose you need me to do you a favour?
2 Ok, Jimmy has to be worth more than a few scrawny chickens!

text.en: Talk to Fred the Farmer in the house of the sheep's pen in Lumbridge.
text.es: Habla con Fred the Farmer en la casa del corral de ovejas en Lumbridge.

chatOptions: 2 I need to talk to you about Jimmy.

text.en: Or if player has seen "The Thing".
text.es: O si el jugador ha visto "The Thing".

chatOptions: 3 I need to talk to you about Jimmy.

text.en: Talk with Seth Groats in the house of the chickens' pen in Lumbridge. (Back on the east side of the river across from the sheep's pen)
text.es: Habla con Seth Groats en la casa del corral de gallinas en Lumbridge. (Al otro lado del río, en el lado este, frente al corral de ovejas)

chatOptions: 2 Oh, ok! I guess it's not that much further to Varrock!

text.en: Take 3 steel bars (cannot be noted) to Horvik in the platebody shop in Varrock (north-east of the central fountain), who is ill and needs a herbal tincture.
text.es: Lleva 3 steel bars (no pueden estar noted) a Horvik, en la tienda de platebody de Varrock (al noreste de la fuente central), que está enfermo y necesita una tintura de hierbas.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about One Small Favour.
3 Hi, I need to talk to you about chicken cages!
2 Ok, I guess one good turn deserves another.

text.en: Speak to the Apothecary twice, located in south-west Varrock, at the potion icon.
text.es: Habla con el Apothecary dos veces, situado al suroeste de Varrock, en el icono de la poción.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about One Small Favour.
5 Horvik is ill, I need herbal tincture.
2 Oh, ok, I guess it's not that far to the Barbarian Village.

text.en: Or if player has destroyed their Doctor's hat.
text.es: O si el jugador ha destruido su Doctor's hat.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about One Small Favour.
5 Horvik is ill, I need breathing salts and herbal tincture.
2 Oh, ok, I guess it's not that far to the Barbarian Village.

text.en: Go to Barbarian Village (also called Gunnarsgrunn) and talk to Tassie Slipcast, located within the pottery building in the south-east.
text.es: Ve a Barbarian Village (también llamada Gunnarsgrunn) y habla con Tassie Slipcast, situada dentro del edificio de cerámica al sureste.

chatOptions: 1 Ok, I'll deal with Hammerspike!

text.en: Enter the Dwarven Mine and find Hammerspike Stoutbeard on the far west side ("Hammerspike's hangout" on the map). Ask him about Tassie Slipcast.
text.es: Entra en el Dwarven Mine y busca a Hammerspike Stoutbeard en el extremo oeste ("Hammerspike's hangout" en el mapa). Pregúntale sobre Tassie Slipcast.

chatOptions: 4 Have you always been a gangster?
2 Ok, another favour..I think I can manage that.

text.en: Go to Taverley and talk with Sanfew, located in the house slightly south-west of Pikkupstix's Summoning Shop.
text.es: Ve a Taverley y habla con Sanfew, situado en la casa un poco al suroeste de la tienda de Invocación de Pikkupstix.

chatOptions: 2 Are you taking any new initiates?
2 Do you accept dwarves?
3 A dwarf I know wants to become an initiate.
1 Yep, it's a deal.

text.en: The quest Druidic Ritual must be completed to speak with Sanfew about One Small Favour.
text.es: Debes haber completado la misión Druidic Ritual para poder hablar con Sanfew sobre One Small Favour.

text.en: If Eadgar's Ruse is completed, or the third option is "Are you taking any new initiates?"
text.es: Si se ha completado Eadgar's Ruse, o la tercera opción es "Are you taking any new initiates?"

chatOptions: 3 Are you taking any new initiates?
2 Do you accept dwarves?
3 A dwarf I know wants to become an initiate.
1 Yep, it's a deal.

text.en: Make a Guthix rest by first adding the harralander to the vial of water, then adding the marrentill. Make sure you use the harralander on the vial, instead of clicking the vial, as you may accidentally use the marrentill first.
text.es: Prepara un Guthix rest añadiendo primero el harralander al vial of water, y luego el marrentill. Asegúrate de usar el harralander sobre el vial, en lugar de hacer clic en el vial, ya que podrías usar accidentalmente el marrentill primero.

text.en: Travel to White Wolf Mountain, and speak to Captain Bleemadge. Right-click to talk to him.
text.es: Viaja al White Wolf Mountain y habla con Captain Bleemadge. Haz clic derecho para hablar con él.

chatOptions: 2 I have a special potion here for you from Sanfew!
4 Ok, I'll go and get you some T.R.A.S.H.

text.en: To reach him enter the cave southwest of the Burthorpe lodestone (behind the Burthorpe mine entrance), then south towards the gnome glider.
text.es: Para llegar hasta él, entra en la cueva al suroeste de la lodestone de Burthorpe (detrás de la entrada de la mina de Burthorpe), y luego ve hacia el sur en dirección al gnome glider.

text.en: 14 free inventory spaces, around 2000 coins (or 2+ cut opals, jades and red topazes in case you crush the ones you get)
text.es: 14 espacios libres en el inventario, alrededor de 2000 monedas (o 2 o más cut opals, jades y red topazes por si rompes las que consigas)

text.en: Travel to Catherby and speak to Arhein on the docks. (General store owner, south of the lodestone)
text.es: Viaja a Catherby y habla con Arhein en los muelles. (El dueño de la tienda general, al sur de la lodestone)

chatOptions: 3 I need to talk T.R.A.S.H. to you.
1 Yes, Ok, I'll do it!

text.en: While here, purchase an empty pot from Arhein's Store.
text.es: Mientras estés aquí, compra una empty pot en la tienda de Arhein.

text.en: Go to Seers' Village and speak to Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight, south-east of the lodestone.
text.es: Ve a Seers' Village y habla con Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight, al sureste de la lodestone.

chatOptions: 4 Hi, can you give me a weather forecast?
5 What can I do to help?
1 Yes, Ok, I'll do it.

text.en: Enter the Goblin Cave south-east of the fishing guild (teleport to the Ardougne lodestone and run north).
text.es: Entra en la Goblin Cave al sureste del fishing guild (teletranspórtate a la lodestone de Ardougne y corre hacia el norte).

text.en: Sometimes the cave is not marked on the minimap. It is just outside the fence opposite the fishing guild building near the windmill.
text.es: A veces la cueva no aparece marcada en el minimapa. Está justo fuera de la valla, enfrente del edificio del fishing guild, cerca del molino de viento.

text.en: Once inside, head north, then east where you find Petra Fiyed trapped in rock. Search the sculpture.
text.es: Una vez dentro, dirígete al norte y luego al este, donde encontrarás a Petra Fiyed atrapada en la roca. Registra la escultura.

text.en: Go to Ardougne and speak to Wizard Cromperty, located north-east from the market.
text.es: Ve a Ardougne y habla con Wizard Cromperty, situado al noreste del mercado.

chatOptions: 4 I need to talk to you about a girl stuck in some rock!
2 Oh! Ok, one more 'small favour' isn't going to kill me..I hope!

text.en: Pick up five pigeon cages from the back yard of the first house south of the north-western bank in Ardougne. There are three cages that will respawn immediately.
text.es: Recoge cinco pigeon cages en el patio trasero de la primera casa al sur del banco noroeste de Ardougne. Hay tres jaulas que reaparecerán inmediatamente.

text.en: Go to Port Khazard (teleport to Catherby and use a charter to Port Khazard or teleport to the Yanille lodestone, run east through town then north) and talk to Tindel Marchant on the southern pier.
text.es: Ve a Port Khazard (teletranspórtate a Catherby y usa un charter hasta Port Khazard, o teletranspórtate a la lodestone de Yanille, corre hacia el este por la ciudad y luego hacia el norte) y habla con Tindel Marchant en el muelle sur.

chatOptions: 2 Ask about iron oxide.
1 Ok, I'll do it!

text.en: While you are here you can also speak to him about identifying swords for one of easy Ardougne achievements, They're Long and Pointy
text.es: Mientras estés aquí, también puedes hablar con él sobre identificar espadas para uno de los logros fáciles de Ardougne, They're Long and Pointy.

chatOptions: 1 Chat about Antiques Store
1 What do you do here?

text.en: Go to the Feldip Hills and talk to Rantz, located to the far east of fairy ring AKS.
text.es: Ve a Feldip Hills y habla con Rantz, situado muy al este del fairy ring AKS.

chatOptions: 1 I need to talk to you about a mattress.
4 Ok, I'll see what I can do.

text.en: Go west to the gnome glider and right-click to talk to Gnormadium Avlafrim.
text.es: Ve hacia el oeste, al gnome glider, y haz clic derecho para hablar con Gnormadium Avlafrim.

chatOptions: 4 Rantz said I should come and help you finish this project.
1 Yes, I'll take a look at them.

text.en: For each of the 8 gnome landing lights immediately east:
text.es: Por cada una de las 8 gnome landing lights situadas inmediatamente al este:

text.en: Select the "Search" option on the gnome landing light to receive an uncut gem.
text.es: Selecciona la opción "Search" en la gnome landing light para recibir una uncut gem.

text.en: Cut the gem. If you crush one talk to the gnome to buy a replacement. .
text.es: Talla la gema. Si rompes una, habla con el gnome para comprar una de repuesto.

chatOptions: 4 I need new gem to fix the lights.
1 Ok, here's 500 gold, I'll buy one.

text.en: Use the cut gem on the light it came from (from west to east is sapphire, opal, red topaz, jade).
text.es: Usa la gema tallada en la luz de la que provino (de oeste a este: sapphire, opal, red topaz, jade).

text.en: Make sure to use them on the gnome landing light.
text.es: Asegúrate de usarlas sobre la gnome landing light.

text.en: Talk to the gnome again.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con el gnome.

chatOptions: 4 I've fixed all the lights!

text.en: Armour and a weapon for the fight with Slagilith (weak to air spells), bronze bar, iron bar, steel bar, empty pot, and 5 pigeon cages
text.es: Armadura y un arma para la lucha contra Slagilith (débil contra los hechizos de aire), bronze bar, iron bar, steel bar, empty pot, y 5 pigeon cages

text.en: Go back to Rantz to receive a comfy mattress.
text.es: Regresa con Rantz para recibir un comfy mattress.

chatOptions: 1 Ok, I've helped that Gnome, he shouldn't bother you anymore.

text.en: Take the mattress to Tindel in Port Khazard, who gives you iron oxide.
text.es: Lleva el colchón a Tindel en Port Khazard, quien te dará iron oxide.

chatOptions: 2 I have the mattress.

text.en: Take the iron oxide to Wizard Cromperty in Ardougne, who gives you an animate rock scroll.
text.es: Lleva el iron oxide a Wizard Cromperty en Ardougne, quien te dará un animate rock scroll.

chatOptions: 4 I have that iron oxide you asked for!

text.en: Read Animate rock scroll in the Goblin Cave near the trapped Petra and kill Slagilith when it appears.
text.es: Lee el Animate rock scroll en la Goblin Cave, cerca de Petra atrapada, y mata a Slagilith cuando aparezca.

text.en: Read Animate rock scroll again, then talk to Petra.
text.es: Lee de nuevo el Animate rock scroll y luego habla con Petra.

text.en: Go to Seers' Village and speak to Phantuwti in his house.
text.es: Ve a Seers' Village y habla con Phantuwti en su casa.

chatOptions: 4 I've released Petra, she should have returned.
4 I'll run you through if you don't give me that weather report.
2 Why can't you get a clear picture?
2 Which special Seers tools do you mean?
1 What do you mean, 'special combination of items'?

text.en: Access the roof via either the ladder on the north wall of Phantuwti's house, or the ladder in the building to the east (you have to go up two ladders to get to the roof).
text.es: Accede al tejado usando la escalera del muro norte de la casa de Phantuwti, o la escalera del edificio al este (tendrás que subir dos escaleras para llegar al tejado).

text.en: Search the weather vane twice to get three broken vane parts.
text.es: Registra la weather vane dos veces para conseguir tres broken vane parts.

text.en: With a bronze bar, an iron bar, and a steel bar, use each of the the parts of the weather vane on any anvil (there is an anvil just north of the house).
text.es: Con un bronze bar, un iron bar y un steel bar, usa cada una de las partes de la weather vane en cualquier yunque (hay un yunque justo al norte de la casa).

text.en: Go back to the roof of the house and put the weathervane pillar, the directionals and the ornament back.
text.es: Vuelve al tejado de la casa y coloca de nuevo el pilar de la weathervane, las direccionales y el ornamento.

text.en: Talk to Phantuwti again and he will give you the weather report.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Phantuwti y te dará el weather report.

chatOptions: 4 I've fixed the weather vane!

text.en: Take the report to Arhein in Catherby.
text.es: Lleva el informe a Arhein en Catherby.

chatOptions: 3 I have the weather report for you.

text.en: Talk to Captain Bleemadge on the White Wolf Mountain.
text.es: Habla con Captain Bleemadge en White Wolf Mountain.

chatOptions: 2 Hey there, did you get your T.R.A.S.H?

text.en: Talk to Sanfew in Taverley. ( If the player has completed "Eadgar's Ruse.")
text.es: Habla con Sanfew en Taverley. (Si el jugador ha completado "Eadgar's Ruse".)

chatOptions: 2 Hi there, the Gnome Pilot has agreed to take you to see the ogres!
3 Hi there, the Gnome Pilot has agreed to take you to see the ogres!

text.en: Talk to Hammerspike Stoutbeard in the Dwarven Mine. Kill his minions. Talk to him again.
text.es: Habla con Hammerspike Stoutbeard en el Dwarven Mine. Mata a sus secuaces. Vuelve a hablar con él.

text.en: Talk to Tassie Slipcast in Barbarian Village.
text.es: Habla con Tassie Slipcast en Barbarian Village.

text.en: Form the unfired pot lid at the nearby potter's wheel.
text.es: Forma la unfired pot lid en la rueda de alfarero cercana.

text.en: Fire the pot lid in the pottery oven.
text.es: Cuece la pot lid en el horno de cerámica.

text.en: Use the pot lid on an empty pot to get an airtight pot.
text.es: Usa la pot lid en una empty pot para conseguir una airtight pot.

text.en: Go to the apothecary in Varrock and give him the pot.
text.es: Ve al apothecary de Varrock y entrégale la olla.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about One Small Favour.
5 Hey there! I have an air-tight pot for you!

text.en: Or if player has destroyed their Doctor's hat.
text.es: O si el jugador ha destruido su Doctor's hat.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about One Small Favour.
5 Hey there! I have an air-tight pot for you!

text.en: Go to Horvik (Varrock Platebody Shop) and give him the herbal tincture and breathing salts.
text.es: Ve a Horvik (la tienda de platebody de Varrock) y entrégale la tintura de hierbas y las sales respiratorias.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about One Small Favour.
3 I have the tincture and the breathing salts.

text.en: Talk to him again with five pigeon cages to get some chicken cages.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con él con las cinco pigeon cages para conseguir unas chicken cages.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about One Small Favour.
3 I have the five pigeon cages you asked for!

text.en: Go to Seth Groats in the house of the chickens' pen in Lumbridge and give him the chicken cages.
text.es: Ve a Seth Groats, en la casa del corral de gallinas en Lumbridge, y entrégale las chicken cages.

text.en: Go to the H.A.M. Hideout and talk to Johanhus.
text.es: Ve al H.A.M. Hideout y habla con Johanhus.

chatOptions: 4 You're in luck, I've managed to swing that chicken deal for you.

text.en: Go to Draynor Village and talk with Aggie the witch.
text.es: Ve a Draynor Village y habla con Aggie la bruja.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about One Small Favour.

text.en: Go to Port Sarim and talk with Brian in his axe shop (north-east of the lodestone), who gives you a sharpened hatchet.
text.es: Ve a Port Sarim y habla con Brian en su tienda de hachas (al noreste de la lodestone), quien te dará un sharpened hatchet.

chatOptions: 3 I've returned with good news.

text.en: Go back to Shilo Village and speak with any jungle forester (closest fairy ring CKR), who gives you red mahogany logs in exchange for the hatchet.
text.es: Regresa a Shilo Village y habla con cualquier jungle forester (el fairy ring más cercano es CKR), quien te dará red mahogany logs a cambio del hacha.

chatOptions: 4 Good news, I have your sharpened hatchet!

text.en: Speak with Yanni in Shilo Village.
text.es: Habla con Yanni en Shilo Village.

chatOptions: 2 Here's the red mahogany you asked for.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
